privacy-policy.서비스 품질 개선·운영 (오류 추적, 성능 분석): Service quality improvement and operations (error tracking, performance analysis)
privacy-policy.업로드 파일(PDF/PPT/DOCX), 커스텀 지시사항, 생성한 퀴즈,: Uploaded files (PDF/PPT/DOCX), custom instructions, generated quizzes, solving records, answers, posts and comments
privacy-policy.원본 파일·이미지 저장: Storage of original files and images
privacy-policy.이용자 삭제 또는 회원 탈퇴 시까지: Until user deletion or account withdrawal
privacy-policy.이용자가 Google·Kakao 소셜 로그인을 통해 가입·로그인하는 경우: When users sign up or log in via Google or Kakao social login, the Company receives a Provider ID from that provider. Please refer to each provider's site for their privacy policy.
privacy-policy.이용자는 개인정보 열람·정정·삭제·처리정지·동의 철회 권리를 행사할 수: Users may exercise rights to access, correct, delete, suspend processing of, and withdraw consent for their personal information. Nickname changes and some data deletions can be performed directly within the service; for other rights, please contact contact@q-asker.com.
privacy-policy.최대 90일 (운영·보안 목적): Up to 90 days (operations and security purposes)
privacy-policy.탈퇴 시 회원 계정과 콘텐츠(퀴즈 세트, 풀이 기록, 게시글)가 삭제됩니: Upon withdrawal, the member account and content (quiz sets, solving records, posts) are deleted.
Solving records and posts can be deleted directly by users within the service.
privacy-policy.회사는 「개인정보보호법」 제26조에 따라 수탁자의 안전한 처리를 관리·감: The Company manages and supervises the safe processing of processors in accordance with Article 26 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
privacy-policy.회사는 HTTPS(TLS) 암호화 통신, JWT 기반 접근 제어, DB: The Company protects personal information through HTTPS (TLS) encrypted communication, JWT-based access control, Jasypt encryption of sensitive DB configuration values, Bucket4j-based rate limiting, and Cloudflare/OCI firewalls. The number of personnel handling data is minimized and access is managed on a role basis.
privacy-policy.회사는 만 14세 이상을 서비스 대상으로 합니다. 만 14세 미만의 가입: The Service is intended for users aged 14 and over. Sign-up by those under 14 is restricted, and any data collected without legal-guardian consent will be deleted immediately upon discovery.
privacy-policy.회사는 원칙적으로 개인정보를 제3자에게 제공하지 않습니다. 다만 이용자가: As a rule, the Company does not provide personal information to third parties. Exceptions apply when the user has given prior consent or when there is a lawful request under applicable laws.
privacy-policy.회사는 위 목적 외 용도(특히 AI 모델 학습, 마케팅, 제3자 판매)로: The Company does not use personal information for purposes other than those listed above — in particular, not for AI model training, marketing, or sale to third parties.
privacy-policy.회원 식별 및 서비스 제공 (OAuth 인증, 이용자별 퀴즈 기록 관리): Member identification and service provision (OAuth authentication, per-user quiz history management)
privacy-policy.회원 탈퇴는 contact@q-asker.com 으로 요청하며, 영업일: Account withdrawal is requested via contact@q-asker.com and processed within 7 business days.
privacy-policy.Q-Asker(이하 \"서비스\")는 「개인정보보호법」을 준수하며, 이용: Q-Asker (hereinafter the "Service") complies with the Personal Information Protection Act and establishes and discloses this policy to safely protect users' personal information.
privacy-policy.서비스는 「개인정보보호법」 제26조에 따라 수탁자의 안전한 처리를 관리·: The Service manages and supervises the safe processing of processors in accordance with Article 26 of the Personal Information Protection Act.
privacy-policy.서비스는 HTTPS(TLS) 암호화 통신, JWT 기반 접근 제어, DB: The Service protects personal information through HTTPS (TLS) encrypted communication, JWT-based access control, Jasypt encryption of sensitive DB configuration values, Bucket4j-based rate limiting, and Cloudflare/OCI firewalls. The number of personnel handling data is minimized and access is managed on a role basis.
privacy-policy.서비스는 만 14세 이상을 서비스 대상으로 합니다. 만 14세 미만의 가: The Service is intended for users aged 14 and over. Sign-up by those under 14 is restricted, and any data collected without legal-guardian consent will be deleted immediately upon discovery.
privacy-policy.서비스는 원칙적으로 개인정보를 제3자에게 제공하지 않습니다. 다만 이용자: As a rule, the Service does not provide personal information to third parties. Exceptions apply when the user has given prior consent or when there is a lawful request under applicable laws.
privacy-policy.서비스는 위 목적 외 용도(특히 AI 모델 학습, 마케팅, 제3자 판매): The Service does not use personal information for purposes other than those listed above — in particular, not for AI model training, marketing, or sale to third parties.
privacy-policy.이용자가 Google·Kakao 소셜 로그인을 통해 가입·로그인하는 경우: When users sign up or log in via Google or Kakao social login, the Service receives a Provider ID from that provider. Please refer to each provider's site for their privacy policy.

Currently only PDF files are supported.

quiz-history.지금까지 만들고 푼 퀴즈들을 확인해보세요: Check out the quizzes you've created and solved
Quiz history is available after logging in.
quiz-history.퀴즈를 만들어서 문제를 풀어보세요!: Create a quiz and start solving!

solve-quiz.빈칸을 클릭하여 답 입력: Click the blank to enter answer
solve-quiz.입력 내용과 선택한 답안이 다릅니다: Your input differs from the selected answer
solve-quiz.입력 내용과 일치하는 보기가 없습니다: No matching option for your input
Progress saved. You will return automatically after login.
solve-quiz.시도에 따라 단계별 힌트가 제시됩니다!: Step-by-step hints are provided with each attempt!
solve-quiz.베타 버전입니다! 건의사항 / 피드백 있으면 부탁드립니다!: This is a beta version! Please share any suggestions or feedback!

terms-of-service.Q-Asker는 PDF, PPT, Word 파일을 업로드하면 AI가 자동: Q-Asker is a free web service that automatically generates quizzes using AI when you upload PDF, PPT, or Word files.
It supports various quiz types including multiple choice, true/false, and fill-in-the-blank.
terms-of-service.회원가입 없이 이용 가능하며, 로그인 시 퀴즈 기록 저장 기능이 제공됩니: You can use the service without signing up. Logging in enables quiz history saving.
You must not use the Service for any illegal purposes.
You must not upload files that infringe on others' copyrights.
You must not engage in activities that disrupt the normal operation of the Service.
You must not access the Service or collect data through automated means.
Uploaded files are processed solely for the purpose of quiz generation.
Files are automatically deleted within 24 hours after processing.
Uploaded files are not used for commercial purposes or AI training.
terms-of-service.파일의 저작권은 이용자에게 있으며, 서비스는 퀴즈 생성을 위한 일시적 이: Copyright of files remains with the user. The Service only holds a temporary license for quiz generation.
The Service may change or discontinue features without prior notice.
terms-of-service.천재지변, 시스템 장애 등 불가항력으로 인한 서비스 중단에 대해 책임지지: We are not liable for service interruptions caused by force majeure, such as natural disasters or system failures.
terms-of-service.AI가 생성한 퀴즈의 정확성을 보장하지 않습니다. 학습 보조 도구로 활용: We do not guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated quizzes. Please use them as a study aid.
We are not liable for any indirect or incidental damages arising from the use of the Service.
terms-of-service.본 약관은 서비스 개선에 따라 변경될 수 있으며, 변경 시 서비스 내 공: These terms may be updated as the Service improves, and changes will be announced within the Service.
If you do not agree to the updated terms, you may discontinue use of the Service.
terms-of-service.7. 서비스 제공·변경·중단 및 면책: 7. Service Provision, Changes, Interruptions, and Disclaimer
terms-of-service.8. 약관 변경 및 분쟁 해결: 8. Changes to Terms and Dispute Resolution
terms-of-service.AI 생성 결과의 상업적 재판매·무단 대량 배포: Commercial resale or unauthorized mass distribution of AI-generated results
terms-of-service.Q-Asker(이하 \"서비스\")를 이용해 주셔서 감사합니다. 본 약관: Thank you for using Q-Asker (hereinafter the "Service"). These terms govern the conditions of use of the Service.
terms-of-service.Q-Asker는 학습 자료를 업로드하면 AI가 자동으로 다양한 유형의 퀴: Q-Asker is a free web service that automatically generates various types of quizzes via AI from your uploaded study materials. It can be used without sign-up; logging in enables features such as saving your solving history.
terms-of-service.닉네임은 이용자가 변경할 수 있으며, 타인 사칭·욕설·혐오 표현은 서비스: Users can change their nicknames. The Service may restrict or change nicknames that involve impersonation, profanity, or hateful expression.
Results may differ from call to call even with the same source material.
terms-of-service.무료로 제공되는 본 서비스의 이용으로 인한 직접·간접·부수적 손해에 대해: The Service shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, or incidental damages arising from use of this free service, except in cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence by the Service.
This Service is intended for users aged 14 and over.
terms-of-service.본 약관은 대한민국 법률에 따라 해석되며, 분쟁은 대한민국 법원을 관할로: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes shall be under the jurisdiction of Korean courts.
terms-of-service.본 약관은 변경 시 시행일 7일 전(이용자에게 불리한 변경은 30일 전): Changes to these terms will be announced within the Service 7 days before the effective date (30 days before for changes unfavorable to users). However, changes that benefit users or urgent responses to laws or security may take effect immediately.
terms-of-service.사실 오류·편향·누락이 있을 수 있으므로 학습 보조 도구로만 활용하고,: Factual errors, bias, or omissions may occur, so results should be used only as a study aid; for important purposes (exams, assessments, etc.) you must verify them yourself.
terms-of-service.서비스는 사전 고지 없이 서비스 일부 또는 전부의 기능을 변경·중단할 수: The Service may change or discontinue some or all features without prior notice.
terms-of-service.서비스를 불법·비윤리적 목적으로 사용: Using the Service for illegal or unethical purposes
Continued use after the effective date is deemed acceptance of the changes.
terms-of-service.업로드한 파일은 퀴즈 생성 목적으로만 처리되며, AI 학습 데이터로 사용: Uploaded files are processed solely for quiz generation and are not used as AI training data.
terms-of-service.외부 서비스(Google Gemini, OCI, GCS, Cloudfla: The Service is not liable for damages caused by outages or policy changes of external services (Google Gemini, OCI, GCS, Cloudflare, etc.), natural disasters, or system failures.
terms-of-service.위반 시 서비스는 사전 통지 없이 이용을 제한·정지하거나 계정을 삭제할: On violation, the Service may restrict or suspend use, or delete accounts, without prior notice.

Users must not engage in the following:
terms-of-service.자동화된 수단(크롤러, 봇, 스크립트)으로 접근하거나 Rate Limit: Accessing via automated means (crawlers, bots, scripts) or bypassing rate limits
Please submit copyright infringement reports via the contact channel.
terms-of-service.퀴즈는 Google Gemini의 추론 결과이며, 서비스는 정확성·완전성: Quizzes are inference outputs from Google Gemini, and the Service does not guarantee accuracy or completeness.
terms-of-service.타 이용자의 계정·기록을 무단 조회·변경하려는 시도: Attempts to access or modify other users' accounts or records without authorization
terms-of-service.타인의 저작권·초상권·상표권을 침해하는 파일 업로드: Uploading files that infringe on others' copyrights, portrait rights, or trademark rights
Files are automatically deleted after at most 1 day.
terms-of-service.파일의 저작권은 이용자에게 있으며, 서비스는 위 목적 범위 내 일시적 이: Copyright of files remains with the user; the Service holds only a temporary license within the scope of the above purposes.
terms-of-service.회원 탈퇴는 contact@q-asker.com 으로 요청하며, 영업일: Account withdrawal is requested via contact@q-asker.com and processed within 7 business days.
